name: agent-sec-scanners
description: Monorepo for the @miaggy scanner family: shared audit engine and provider packs

scripts.build: npm run build -w @miaggy/core && npm run build -w bedrock-security-mcp && npm run build -w @miaggy/mcp-audit
scripts.test: npm run build -w @miaggy/core && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
